# SimpliiGood

> SimpliiGood grows fresh spirulina and flash-freezes it within 24 hours of harvest into ready-to-blend frozen cubes — a flavor-free alternative to dried spirulina powder. One ingredient: spirulina and water. Non-GMO Project Verified, vegan, gluten-free. Sold in 300+ US retail stores and online. A second division, Simplii Texture, engineers spirulina into plant-based seafood textures for the food industry.

## Key product facts (from the Nutrition Facts label)

- Product: SimpliiGood Fresh-Frozen Spirulina Cubes (10 cubes per tray, 140 g)
- Serving: 2 cubes (28 g) = 10 calories, 2 g complete plant protein, 1.9 mg iron (10% DV), 60 mg potassium, 8 mg vitamin C (9% DV), 1 g fiber, 0 g fat, 0 g sugar
- Per tray (5 servings): 11 g protein, 9.5 mg iron (50% DV), 42 mg vitamin C (47% DV)
- Grown in greenhouse pools of food-grade fresh water; harvested daily; flash-frozen within 24 hours — no drying, no powdering, phycocyanin and chlorophyll kept intact
- Flavor-free: unlike dried powder, fresh-frozen spirulina does not taste fishy or swampy
- Keep frozen; drop a cube straight into a smoothie, juice or bowl

## Where to buy

- 300+ retail stores across the US — store locator: https://www.simpliigood.com/simplii-green.html#stores
- Online: https://shop.simpliigood.com

## Pages

- [Home / division chooser](https://www.simpliigood.com/): the SimpliiGood brand and its two divisions
- [Simplii Green — the consumer product](https://www.simpliigood.com/simplii-green.html): fresh-frozen spirulina cubes, benefits, nutrition, FAQ, store locator
- [Simplii Texture — food-tech division](https://www.simpliigood.com/texture.html): spirulina-based plant-based seafood textures for industry; sample requests
- [About](https://www.simpliigood.com/about.html): company story — 12 years growing spirulina
- [Food Service](https://www.simpliigood.com/food-service.html): trays for cafes, smoothie bars, juice bars and distributors
- [Where to Buy — full store list](https://www.simpliigood.com/where-to-buy.html): every US store by state (Wegmans, Food Bazaar, ShopRite, Citarella and more) plus the online shop
- [Recipes](https://www.simpliigood.com/recipes.html): 10 fresh-frozen spirulina recipes (smoothies, bowls, shots, dips), a 7-day challenge, flavor pairings and FAQ — every recipe uses 2 cubes (28 g)
- [Fresh vs. Powder](https://www.simpliigood.com/fresh-vs-powder.html): side-by-side comparison of fresh-frozen spirulina and dried spirulina powder

- [Contact](https://www.simpliigood.com/contact.html): email, phone (+1 347-474-0172), live chat and our New York office
